at waist height a reasonable distance.Must be able to:push/pull with 30 lbs.

If you are interested in applying and require special assistance or accommodations due to a disability, please contact our Human Resources department at hr@lmrtec.com .
Manages and directs the care of fitness spaces on board the ship, in coordination with the Recreation Services Officer (RSO).
Any discrepancies must be resolved as a condition of employmentMust be a U.S.
Qualifications Resumes must include information which demonstrates experience and knowledge, skills, and ability (KSAs) as they relate to this position.
Applicants are encouraged to be clear and specific when describing their experience level and KSAs.
Candidates must possess a fitness certification from the National Commission for Certifying Agencies (NCCA) or Distance Education Accrediting Commission (DEAC).
Candidates must also have one of the following fitness-related education/experience combinations:
Knowledge of anatomy, physiology, and kinesiology as relates to exercise and physical fitness.
Knowledge of military physical fitness standards and testing procedures.
Knowledge of budgeting, internal controls, cash management, and inventory systems.
Skill in planning and executing a comprehensive fitness and/or sports program that includes a variety of fitness activities.
Skill in developing and adapting new methods, approaches and procedures for the most effective management of a fitness program.
Skill which applies to marketing and promoting fitness, nutrition and sports activities.
Ability to perform maintenance and repairs on fitness equipment.
Ability to develop and effectively deliver presentations and/or training.
Ability to communicate effectively both orally and in writing.
Accredited health/fitness organization is required per Department of Defense (DoD) MWR Fitness Standards.
https://www.deac.org/Student-Center/Directory-Of-Accredited-Institutions.aspx Certificate MUST be submitted at time of application in order to be considered.
Education/Experience A four-year degree or higher from an accredited college or university with a major in Exercise Physiology, Physical education, or related field.
OR Two or more years of specialized fitness-related experience.
If qualifying all or in-part based on education, proof of education MUST be submitted at time of application in order to be considered.

****Please review our schedule online to ensure that your availability matches with our current offerings.

in Mathematics required, M.A.
The school attracts a student body noted for its academic ability and its diversity, and it offers top salaries and benefits to its faculty.

Grammatical structure is taught orally throughout the curriculum, as required by given situations, rather than in a structured series of exercises.
The ultimate goal of the study of world language at ESA is to demonstrate that a world language can become a natural means of communication and an integral part of life.

Ideal candidates should have a high degree of fluency in both Spanish and French (at least Advanced on the ACTFL proficiency level or at least B2 on the DELF framework).
